TITLE
	Minimal Solar Collector Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (7/15) 7/20-7/21 ;
	PRINT 7/20-7/21 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	CollSurf a=0.0 w=30.0 ;
*

EQPCAT
	COL TestColl b0=0.78 b1=5.0 Fd=0.9 Ac=5.0 Ag=5.0 ;
*

SYSCMP
	Collector -c TestColl -exs CollSurf ;
*

SYSPTH
	CollPath -sys A -f W
		> (0.05) Collector > ;
*

CONTL
	CollPath=WorkSchedule ;
	%s -s WorkSchedule 601-(-)-1800 ;
*
*
